subject: IMPORTANT: SentinelAI Account Verification Required (ACC_10073)
body:
Dear Account_Holder_ACC_10073,

We are conducting a standard compliance review on account ACC_10073. Please submit the following documentation: Bank statements (last 3 months), Source of funds declaration form, Proof of income / Employer verification, Valid Government-issued ID / Passport, Detailed explanation of flagged transactions, Legal representation details / Compliance affidavit.

Sincerely,
SentinelAI Compliance Team
